[fit]
cd ~/pace-sim2real
python scripts/pace/fit.py --headless --num_envs=4096 --task=Isaac-Pace-P73-Walker-v0

[log]
pace-sim2real/logs/pace/p73_walker

Key files include:

    config.pt: full configuration and dataset metadata
    best_trajectory.pt: best simulated joint trajectory
    mean_xxx.pt: mean parameter estimates per iteration
    
[plot]
python scripts/pace/plot_trajectory.py --plot_trajectory --robot_name=p73_walker

[actuatornet]
python actuator_net_comparison.py --task Isaac-Pace-P73-Walker-v0 --actuator_net_dir /home/bru24-server/IsaacSim/pace-sim2real/data/p73_lstm_


[best param]
